---
title: "Will paddle for mince pies"
date: 2020-12-20
categories: ["halton-rapids","club: lancaster","whitewater"]
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/nYvnDU7VobIeauk8sGrUn9eOM4Mta9sX32muqqFMniM-768x430.jpg
---

- Distance: 2.3 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/4496933392)

Club paddlers were on the river yesterday at a slightly higher level than previous weeks (1.1m). Much enjoyed and nice to see our 2 youngest paddlers out bursting with enthusiasm. A bit of a Xmas paddle... it was nice to have a bit of a "socialise " at the end with a variety of beverages and Christmasy food.  

![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/nYvnDU7VobIeauk8sGrUn9eOM4Mta9sX32muqqFMniM-768x430.jpg)
